title: Boy, 16, arrested after police discover body of 13-year-old girl in Victorian bushland
summary_full: Police say death of Layla Jeffery ‘suspicious’ after remains found in town of Donald in western VictoriaGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA 16-year-old boy has been arrested after the body of a 13-year-old girl, who went missing on the weekend, was found in bushland in regional Victoria.Victoria police said they were treating Layla Jeffery’s death as “suspicious” after her remains were found in Donald, a small town in western Victoria, late on Thursday afternoon following an extensive search.
